reportId.description: unique ID of the report within the company

reportNumber.description: short unique ID of the report

reportType.description: Type of expense report. SR: Statement Report; CR: Reconciliation Report; RR: Expense Assistant Report; RG: n/a

firstSubmitTimestamp.description: date the report was submitted first

firstApprovedTimestamp.description: date the report was approved first

processorEntryTimestamp.description: date the report entered processor queue

processingPaymentTimestamp.description: date the report entered extract step

rejectionReasonCodes.description: the reason code for report if it is rejected or sent back. INDT: Incorrect Details; INET: Incorrect Expense Type; INIT: Incorrect Itemization; INRS: Incorrect Receipt/Substantiation; MCAT: Missing Card Transaction; MIRS: Missing Receipt/Substantiation; MIRA: Missing Required Approval; OOPO: Outside of Policy

totalPersonalAmount.description: Total personal amount reported by traveler

approvalStatus.description: The report's approval status. A_NOTF: Not Submitted; A_FILE: Submitted; A_PEND: Submitted & Pending Approval; A_APPR: Approved; A_ACCO: Approved & in Accounting Review; A_RESU: Sent Back to Employee; A_PVAL: Pending Validation; A_PECO: Pending Cost Object Approval; A_PBDG: Pending Budget Approval; A_RHLD: Hold for Receipt Image; A_PCAS: Pending Control Audit Service; A_TEXP: Approval Time Expired; A_EXRW: Pending Exception Review; A_PREC: Recalled to Processor; A_TREC: Recalled by Traveller; A_AAFH:Anomaly & Fraud Check; A_EXTV: Pending External Validation; A_FOBG: Pending Funds Reservation; A_FCHK: Pending Funds Check

paymentStatus.description: The report's payment status. P_HOLD: Holding Payment; P_NOTP: Not Paid; P_PAID: Paid; P_PAYC: Payment Confirmed; P_PROC: Processing Payment; P_FAIL: Financial Posting Failed

auditStatus.description: The status of audit for the report. PASS: Audit passed; FAIL: Audit failed; NOTR: Audit not required

country.description: point in time value of employee country

countrySubdivision.description: point in time value of employee country subdivision

reimbursementCurrency.description: 3 letter ISO currency code. This is related to reimbursement amount

limitApproved.description: has the report been limit approved against the total amount

exceptionApproved.description: has this report been approved by an authorized approver with exception authority

exceptionLevelTotal.description: Sum of the severity levels assigned to exceptions the expense report generated

exceptionLevelMax.description: Maximum severity level among the exceptions the expense report generated

delegateSubmitted.description: flag indicating if the report was submitted by delegate

delegateApproved.description: flag indicating if the report was approved by delegate

delegateCreated.description: flag indicating if the report was created by delegate

hasReceivedCashAdvanceReturn.description: flag indicating if the report contains cash advance return

isFinancialIntegrationEnabled.description: Does the report get integrated with SAP FI

hasReceivedPaperReceipts.description: have there been paper receipts received for this report

isReceiptImageAvailable.description: does the report have receipt images available

hasReceipts.description: have the receipts been received for this report

everSentBack.description: has this report been ever sent back

customFields.description: list of custom fields. The value is unique ID of ListItem if the field is a list field.

exceptions.description: list of exceptions attached to the report

comments.description: list of comments attached to the report

addedFor.description: UUID of the person for which the comment has been added

actor.description: UUID of who took the action

delegate.description: UUID of delegate if delegate took the action

roleCode.description: the role code of the user assigned on the step. SYSTEM: System; MANAGER: Expense Approver; MANAGER1: Default Approver; MANAGER2: Default Approver 2; CO_APPROVER: Cost Object Approver; AUTH_APPROVER: Authorized Approver; BDGT_APPROVER: Budget Approver / Manager; BUDGET_OWNER: Budget Owner; EXTERNAL_SYSTEM: External System; ACCT_CLERK: Expense Processor; ACCT_MANAGER: Expense Processor Manager; ACCT_AUDIT_MGR: Expense Processor (Audit); CONCUR_AUDITOR: Expense Processor(Concur Audit); TRAVEL_ADMIN: Authorization Request Administrator; CR_PROCESSOR: Central Reconciliation Processor

actor.description: UUID of who took the action

delegate.description: UUID of delegate if delegate took the action

roleCode.description: the role code of the user assigned on the step. SYSTEM: System; CO_APPROVER: Cost Object Approver; BDGT_APPROVER: Budget Approver / Manager

expenses.description: list of expenses attached to the report

spendCategory.description: spend category code for the expense. ADVTG: Advertising/Marketing; AIRFR: Airfare; CARRT: Car Rental; CASHA: Cash Advance - Not Partially Approvable; CASHN: Cash Advance - Standard; COCAR: Company Car - Fixed Expense; COCRM: Company Car - Mileage Reimbursement; COMPU: Computer; ENTER: Entertainment; FEESD: Fees/Dues; GASXX: Gas; GRTRN: Ground Transportation; JGTRN: Ground Transportation - Japanese; LODGA: Lodging - Track Hotel Spending; LODGN: Lodging - Do Not Track Hotel Spending; MEALA: Meal - Count in Daily Meal Allowance; MEALN: Meal - Do Not Count in Daily Meal Allowance; MEALS: Meal; MEETG: Meetings; MFUEL: Fuel For Mileage; OFFIC: Office Supplies; OTHER: Other; PRCAR: Personal Car - Fixed Expense; PRCRM: Personal Car - Mileage Reimbursement; PRKNG: Personal Car - Parking Expense; RAILX: Train; SHIPG: Shipping; SUBSC: Subscription/Publication; TELEC: Telecom/Internet; TRADE: Trade/Convention; TRAIN: Training; ACCNT: Accounting; ABFEE: Agent/Booking Fees; CARXX: Car Related; DONAT: Donations; CONSL: Consulting Services; FACLT: Facility; FINAN: Financial Services; GIFTS: Gifts; INSUR: Insurance; JANTR: Janitorial; LEGAL: Legal Services; LODGT: Lodging Tax; LODGX: Lodging; OSUPP: Other Supplies; PRNTG: Printing/Reproduction; PROFS: Professional Services; RENTL: Rent; STAFF: Staffing; UTLTS: Utilities; AIRFE: Airline Fees; GOODW: Goodwill; INCTA: Incidental - Count in Daily Incidental Allowance

source.description: The source associated with the expense. MOBIL: Mobile; CONNT: Connect; EXPIT: ExpenseIt OTHER: Other

isPersonal.description: The type of transaction associated with the expense. STD: Standard Entry; PAR: Parent Entry; REG: Reqular Entry CHD: Child Entry

code.description: The value is unique ID of ListItem

transactionCurrencyCode.description: 3 letter ISO currency code. This is related to transaction amount

value.description: Exchange rate data for the expense

direction.description: The operation on the Exchange rate. M: Multiply; D: Divide

receiptType.description: report entry receipt type. T: Tax Receipt; R: Regular Receipt; N: No receipt

customFields.description: list of custom fields. The value is long code if the field is a list field.

comments.description: list of comments attached to the report entry

addedFor.description: UUID of the person for which the comment has been added

exceptions.description: list of exceptions attached to the report entry

attendees.description: list of attendees attached to the report entry

customFields.description: list of custom fields. The value is long code if the field is a list field.
list of custom fields. The value is long code if the field is a list field.
list of custom fields. The value is long code if the field is a list field.

exceptions.description: list of exceptions attached to the allocation

journals.description: list of journals attached to the allocation

debitOrCredit.description: Journal debit or credit. DR: Debit; CR: Credit
